title: Helped launch a neighborhood fridge program
detail: Coordinated volunteers, wrote simple intake guidelines, and kept the spreadsheet kind.

title: Self-published a 24-page zine
detail: Essays and film photos, saddle-stitched by hand. Sold out the first run in three weeks.

title: Maintained a small open-source CLI tool
detail: Mostly documentation and issue triage—unsexy work that keeps software humane.
